titleStmt.title: SII 22.286: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 286. (A.R. No. 286 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. KŌNĒRINMAIKOṆḌĀN—14th YEAR.

summary.p: This is evidently an inscription of Uttama-Chōḷa. It states that while the king was staying in his palace at Kachchippēḍu (Kāñchīpuram), it was represented to him through (the officer) Śōḻa-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ that the village Śiṟṟiyāṟṟūr in Maṇaiyil-nāḍu a division of Maṇaiyil-kōṭṭam had been granted, in the 21st year of Toṇḍaimānāṟṟūr-tuñjina-Uḍaiyār (Āditya I), as dēvadāna-brahmadēya to the Sabhā of Puduppākkam in Puriśai-nāḍu in the same kōṭṭam with the stipulation that they were to pay as dēvadāna-iṟaiyili to the temple of Tirumālpēṟuḍaiyār 3000 kāḍi (of paddy) as puravu and 561 kāḍi as iravu in addition to 200(1/2) kaḻañju and a mañjāḍi. This order had been confirmed in the 4th year of Parakēsarivarman “who took Madurai and Īḻam” viz., Parāntaka I, excluding from its purview the lands in the village which had belonged to one Śaṅgappāḍi-kiḻāṉ, for which the owner was to pay independently 3000 kāḍi to the temple. This practice was in force till the 36th year of the king (Parāntaka I), when the Sabhā of Puduppākkam expropriated the lands of Saṅgappāḍi-kiḻāṉ and discontinued the payment he was making. The temple authorities therefore now appealed to the reigning king against this injustice. The latter thereupon sent for the complainants and the Sabhā of Puduppākkam, and after due enquiry into the matter passed orders to the Sabhā to restore the payment in future to the temple, of the 3000 kāḍi also due on Saṅgappāḍi-kiḻān's land in addition to their own original dues of the puravu and iravu (rents) in paddy, and the cash payment they had been making. It was also ordered that this was to be entered in the Tax-Registers, and the order was issued to the temple authorities by the king's officers including Parakēsari-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ and Śembiyaṉ Uttaramantri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koṉeriṉ ( I
ṉ) mai koṇṭāṉ maṇai
yil koṭṭattu maṇaiyil nā
ṭārkkum brahmateyakki
ḻavarkkum tevatāṉap
paḷḷiccantak kaṇimuṟṟu
ṭṭu veṭṭappeṟṟūrkaḷilā
rkkum nakaraṅkaḷilārkkum yāṇṭu 10 4
āvatu nāḷ 100 10 6- ṉāl kaccippe
ṭṭu nam(pi) viṭṭinuḷḷālp poṉmāḷikai
Ātipūmiyil nāmirukkac coḻamuven
taveḷāṉ tirumālppeṟṟu māhādeva
ṟkku maṇaiyilk koṭṭattu maṇaiyil nāṭṭu
cciṟṟiyāṟṟūr caṅkappāṭikiḻāṉ kāṇinik
kip puravu muvāyirakkāṭiyum Iravu Aiñṉū
ṟṟu Aṟupattoru kāṭiyum poṉ Iruṉūṟṟukkaḻa
ñcaraiye mañcāṭiyun tevatāṉa Iṟai
yiliyāy Ippuravum Iravum poṉ
ṉum tevarkku Iṟuppatāka Ikkoṭṭattuppuricai nā
ṭṭup pirahmateyam putuppākkattu sabhaiyāṟkut te
vatāṉa brahmatecamākat toṇṭaimāṉāṟṟūrt tuñciṉa Uṭai
yāṟku Irupattoṉṟāvatu kuṭutta Irupattiraṇṭa
kai naṭantu śāsanam ceytu kuṭuttu variiliṭā
nta Ivvūrai matiraiyum Īḻamuṅ koṇṭa kopparakesa
ripanmaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvatu tevatāṉa brahmadeyamāka vari
yiliṭṭa Itaṉāl puravum Iravum poṉṉum putuppā
kkattu sabhaiyārey tevaṟkku Iṟuttu vārāniṉṟā
rkaḷ Icciṟṟiyāṟṟūr caṅkappāṭikiḻāṉ kāṇikaḷil mu
talāy varukiṉṟa puravu muvāyirakkāṭiyum matiraiyum Īḻamu
ṅkoṇṭa kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu muppattāṟāvatu
tirumālppeṟṟu mātevarkkey tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka variyi
lliṭṭu Ipparicu kuṭutta Iccaṅkappāṭikiḻāṉ kāṇiyaip putu
ppākkattu sabhaiyār paṟṟi yāṇṭu tevarkku yiṟaiyiṟātoḻi
kiṉṟārkaḷeṉṟu tevakaṉmikaḷum Uṇṇāḻikaiyuṭai
yārum paṉmāyeśvararum vantu Aṉiyāyam Aṭukiṉṟārkaḷ Eṉ
ṟu namakku colla tirumāl peṟṟut tevakaṉmikaḷ Uṇṇā
ḻikai Uṭaiyārkaḷaiyum paṉmāyeśvararaiyum putuppākkattu [ sabhai]
yāraiyum Aḻaittu nām Ārāynta Iṭattu

putuppākkattu sa
bhaiyār ciṟṟiyāṟṟū
rc caṅkappāṭi kiḻā
ṉ kāṇiyāl tevarkku
Iṟaiyiṟātey tevatā
ṉaṅkaḷai Aṉupavittu
varukiṉṟamaiy Icai
ntamaiyil putuppākka
ttu sabhaiyārt ta
ṇṭaṅkoṇṭu Icca
ṅkappāṭi kiḻāṉ kāṇi muvā
yirak kāṭiyum tirumālppeṟṟuuṭaiyārkkup putup
pākkattu sabhaiyārey Iṟuppatāka Ivarkaḷukke
yāṇṭu 10 4Āvatu mutal tevatāṉa pirahmate
yamāy Itaṉāl puravu muvāyirakkāṭiyum ciṟṟiṭayāṟṟu Ūro
m muṉṉiṟuttuvarukiṉṟa puravu muvāyirakkāṭiyum Iravu
Aiññūṟṟu Aṟupattorukāṭiyum poṉ Irunūṟṟu kaḻa
ñcaraiye mañcāṭiyum Ākap puravu Āṟāyirakkāṭiyum
Iravu Aiññūṟṟu Aṟupattoru kāṭiyum poṉ Irunūṟṟu
kaḻañcaraiye mañcāṭiyun tirumālpeṟṟu mātevarkkup
putuppākkattu sabhaiyār Iṟuppatāka tevatāna brahmateyamā
y Iṟaiyiliyāka variyiliṭṭukkoḷkaveṉṟu nāñ col
la naṅkarumamārāykiṉṟa paruttikkuṭaiyāṉ kotukulavaṉ
cāttanāṉa parakecarimuventa veḷāṉum naṭuvirukkaip
pallait tiyampakapaṭṭanum cakkaruṭaiyāṉ nakcun kaṇi
ccaṉāṉa coḻamuven=taveḷārum Āṇattiyum vāyk
keḻviyumāyk keṭṭu nam Olaiyeḻutum Aṇāṟṟūru
ṭaiyāṉ Uttaramantiri paṭṭālakaṉeḻuttiṉālum nam O
laināyakaṉ coḻamuventaveḷāṉ Oppinālum pukkat
tiṭṭiṉpaṭi variyiliṭṭuk koḷkaveṉṟu naṅ karuma mārāy
kiṉṟa parakecari muventa veḷāṉ nevap puravu
varic cempiyaṉ Uttaraman=tiriyā

riyum va
rippot
taka kaṇakku
meṉāraṇama
ṅkalamuṭai
yāṉ
yarṉkuḻi
yum neṟkku
ṉṟamuṭaiyā
ṉ parañco
ti paṭṭālakaṉu
m variyil li
ṭṭu Uṭaiyūru
ṭaiyāṉ cūri
yaṉ cāttaṉum
laikkuṟicciyuṭaiyāṉ
ṉaiyu pāṇaṉum Iruntu yāṇ
ṭu 10 4Āvatu nāḷ 2 10 18ṉāl tirumā
tāṉam Iṟaiyili
yāṉa taṅkaḷ nāṭṭu ciṟṟiyāṟṟu caṅkap
pāṭikiḻāṉ kāṇiyāl yāṉa muvāyirakkā
ṭiyum puricaināṭṭu brahmadeyam putu
ppākkattu sabhaiyāre Iṟuppatā
ka Ivarkaḷukku tevatāṉa brahmadeya
ṉālp puravu muvāyirakkāṭi
yum ciṟṟiyāṟṟūrā kaṉmuvā
ṇiṟuttuvarukiṉṟa puravu muvāyirak
kāṭiyum Iravu Aiññūṟṟu Aṟupat
torukāṭiyum poṉ Irupattaṟukaḻa
ñcaraiye mañcāṭiyum Āka nel
lu Āṟāyirattaññūṟṟu Aṟupa
ttorukāṭiyum poṉ Irupattu Ai
ñcaraiye mañcāṭiyum tirumāṟp
peṟṟu mahātevarkku putuppākka
ttu sabhaiyom Iṟuppatāka
varikaḷukkut teva[ tāṉa bra]
mateyam ruvariyi
ttom
tittaṉāṉa miṉa
veḷāṉeḻuttu
ṭaiyāṉ nakkaṉ
coḻamuven
ṇikka Eḻutineṉ ma
ṇaiyiṟ koṭṭattu
paḷuvūrṉāṭṭu paḷuvū
ruṭaiyāṉ
Aparājitapaṭṭaneṉ
Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu .
